message:
chore(beads): create alien artifact enhancement epic with 34 beads across 9 tracks

Synthesizes extreme-software-optimization, alien-artifact-coding, and
alien-graveyard skills into actionable work items matched to measured
hotspots. Tracks: S3-FIFO cache (EV=20), Evidence Ledger (EV=25),
PropTest (EV=50), Bayesian TUI Diff (EV=10), Coalesce Sharding (EV=12.5),
Incremental Layout (EV=20), BOCPD+Conformal (EV=8/10.7), Galaxy-Brain
(EV=8), Quick Wins (EV=3/12/15). All beads have recommendation contracts,
acceptance criteria, isomorphism proofs, and fallback triggers. Graph
validated: 0 cycles, 9 ready leaf tasks, 52 edges.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
